source_score_shape: Local K-score uses accuracy, size, latency, cost, coverage, and a 0.85 ship gate.
kolm_mapping: Keep K-score as artifact-run evidence, not imported source evidence.
normalization_rule: Only artifact eval replay can set K-score accuracy and ship status.
risk: External scores could inflate artifact proof without replay.
recommended_action: Add a no-source-score-direct-to-K-score rule.

source_score_shape: `rs-1-evals` stores input and expected output from positives.
kolm_mapping: Derive eval cases from normalized rows after score policy, but embed only safe eval fields.
normalization_rule: Source scores stay in importer manifest or trace rows.
risk: Artifacts could leak source metadata or treat comments as expected output.
recommended_action: Define an eval embedding allowlist.

source_score_shape: Artifact eval replay uses deep equality against expected output.
kolm_mapping: Map external rubrics to selection evidence, not current replay scoring.
normalization_rule: Until rubric evaluators exist, artifact pass/fail remains exact/deep equality.
risk: Partial-credit source scores will not match Kolm eval semantics.
recommended_action: Document current exact-match limit and add rubric runner later.

source_score_shape: Artifact receipts bind eval_score and eval_set_hash.
kolm_mapping: Keep source scores out of receipt.eval_score unless recomputed by artifact evals.
normalization_rule: Receipt eval_score remains tied to embedded eval evidence.
risk: Receipts become misleading if they sign external dashboard scores.
recommended_action: Add importer receipt fields separately from artifact receipts.

source_score_shape: Scores have names, values, data types, comments, and attach to traces, observations, sessions, or dataset runs.
kolm_mapping: Map to name, type, value_raw, value_numeric or label, comment, attached_to.
normalization_rule: Numeric/boolean/categorical/text types must be preserved.
risk: Text and categorical scores can be misread as numeric quality.
recommended_action: Use Langfuse score type as a required fixture field.

source_score_shape: Numeric score values represent continuous judgments such as accuracy or relevance.
kolm_mapping: Map to type=numeric with min/max/direction from score config or score-map.
normalization_rule: Do not normalize without known range and direction.
risk: Unknown scales turn 90, 9, and 0.9 into incompatible signals.
recommended_action: Require score-map for numeric scores when config is absent.

source_score_shape: Boolean scores represent pass/fail checks.
kolm_mapping: Map to passed and value_numeric 1 or 0.
normalization_rule: Boolean can select holdout rows but cannot set K-score directly.
risk: A source pass can be mistaken for artifact pass.
recommended_action: Use boolean scores only for eval candidate trust.

source_score_shape: Categorical scores are predefined labels.
kolm_mapping: Map label to passed only when score-map defines category semantics.
normalization_rule: Unknown categories stay raw evidence.
risk: Labels like partial, harmful, or irrelevant need per-project interpretation.
recommended_action: Require categorical map before eval selection.

source_score_shape: Text scores are qualitative annotations and not useful for aggregation.
kolm_mapping: Map to comment or qualitative evidence only.
normalization_rule: Text never creates passed/value_numeric by default.
risk: Narrative feedback can be incorrectly treated as pass/fail.
recommended_action: Store text as evidence and require manual conversion.

source_score_shape: Feedback records include key, score, value, comment, run/session IDs, and feedback source.
kolm_mapping: Map key to name, score to value_numeric, value to label, comment to comment, source to scorer.
normalization_rule: Run ID and session ID attach feedback to source spans.
risk: Feedback loses scorer origin and categorical meaning.
recommended_action: Preserve feedback_source and require score-map for value fields.

source_score_shape: Feedback can come from app traces, inline users, annotation queues, offline evaluators, or online evaluators.
kolm_mapping: Map source type to scorer.kind and scorer.ref.
normalization_rule: Human/user/LLM/code origins stay separate.
risk: User thumbs-up and evaluator correctness have different reliability.
recommended_action: Use scorer.kind in eval selection policy.

source_score_shape: Run data includes feedback_stats aggregations.
kolm_mapping: Map aggregates to importer manifest, not row-level scores unless source feedback rows are available.
normalization_rule: Aggregates cannot reconstruct individual eval cases.
risk: Aggregate averages could create fake row labels.
recommended_action: Keep feedback_stats as summary metadata only.

source_score_shape: BTQL examples query input, output, and scores from project logs.
kolm_mapping: Map every score key/value pair to a normalized score while keeping raw scores map.
normalization_rule: Score-map supplies scale, direction, and threshold.
risk: Braintrust score keys can vary by project.
recommended_action: Require per-project Braintrust score-map.

source_score_shape: Experiment insert examples include scores with output rows.
kolm_mapping: Map experiment scores to source experiment refs and eval evidence.
normalization_rule: Experiment scores can select holdout evals if scale is known.
risk: Experiment proof becomes disconnected from imported traces.
recommended_action: Preserve experiment ID and score key names.

source_score_shape: BTQL can export logs, experiments, or datasets to JSON or Parquet.
kolm_mapping: Map exported score fields with row checksums and source checksums.
normalization_rule: Large exports need loss reports for unnormalized scores.
risk: Batch imports can silently drop score columns.
recommended_action: Emit a per-score loss report for BTQL imports.

source_score_shape: Phoenix Score includes name, kind, direction, optional score, optional label, explanation, and metadata.
kolm_mapping: Map direction directly and preserve kind/explanation/metadata.
normalization_rule: Direction is required for numeric normalization.
risk: Kolm could invert lower-is-better signals.
recommended_action: Use Phoenix as the model for required score direction.

source_score_shape: Phoenix distinguishes signal origin such as llm, code, or human.
kolm_mapping: Map kind to scorer.kind.
normalization_rule: Origin affects trust and audit policy.
risk: An LLM judge and deterministic exact match would be weighted equally.
recommended_action: Preserve kind and allow project policy by kind.

source_score_shape: Phoenix scores may include categorical labels with explanations.
kolm_mapping: Map label to label and explanation to comment; map to passed only by score-map.
normalization_rule: Labels are not automatically binary.
risk: Categorical labels can be over-normalized.
recommended_action: Require explicit label map for pass/fail.

source_score_shape: Weave eval export returns per-row trials with model output and scores.
kolm_mapping: Map per-trial scores to scores[] and keep prediction IDs.
normalization_rule: Row scores can inform eval selection when scorer meaning is mapped.
risk: Trials can be confused with final expected outputs.
recommended_action: Separate trial output from expected output.

source_score_shape: Weave can return resolved dataset inputs with eval result rows.
kolm_mapping: Map raw_data_row to input/expected candidates and row_digest to proof/source ID.
normalization_rule: Dataset inputs are needed to reproduce evals.
risk: Scores without resolved inputs cannot become eval cases.
recommended_action: Require resolved rows for eval-case generation.

source_score_shape: Weave can return pass rates for binary scorers and numeric means for continuous scorers.
kolm_mapping: Map summaries to importer manifest only.
normalization_rule: Aggregates cannot create per-row pass/fail labels.
risk: Summary pass rates could pollute K-score accuracy.
recommended_action: Do not derive eval cases from aggregate summaries.

source_score_shape: Weave row_digest is content-addressable for dataset inputs.
kolm_mapping: Map to proof.source_checksum or source.source_row_id.
normalization_rule: Digest supports dedupe and reproducibility.
risk: Duplicate rows can inflate eval coverage.
recommended_action: Use row_digest for dedupe before selection.

source_score_shape: Helicone datasets curate high-quality request/response examples but are not primarily a scoring system.
kolm_mapping: Map curation to routing.split or selection metadata, not scores unless score metadata exists.
normalization_rule: Curation alone is not a quality score.
risk: Curated datasets can be over-trusted.
recommended_action: Mark curated rows as selected_by_source, not passed.

source_score_shape: OpenPipe JSONL includes split for train/test rows.
kolm_mapping: Map split to routing.split and eval-case split.
normalization_rule: Split is routing metadata, not score.
risk: Train rows could leak into holdout K-score.
recommended_action: Honor split and keep test/holdout separate.

source_score_shape: External score thresholds vary by project and source.
kolm_mapping: Store threshold per normalized score from score-map or source config.
normalization_rule: No default threshold for arbitrary numeric scores.
risk: A 0.5 threshold may be wrong for relevance, safety, or toxicity.
recommended_action: Require threshold when score controls eval selection.

source_score_shape: Some metrics are higher-is-better; others are lower-is-better or target-range.
kolm_mapping: Store direction as required for numeric normalization.
normalization_rule: Unknown direction disables eval selection.
risk: Lower toxicity could be treated as failure if direction is guessed.
recommended_action: Fail closed on missing direction.

source_score_shape: A row can have multiple scorers with different judgments.
kolm_mapping: Keep all scores and compute selection policy separately.
normalization_rule: Conflict policy should be explicit: any_fail, majority, trusted_scorer, or manual.
risk: The importer may hide disagreement.
recommended_action: Emit conflicts in loss reports and importer manifest.

source_score_shape: Some scores should affect eval weight, not pass/fail.
kolm_mapping: Map weight only through score-map, never from raw score by default.
normalization_rule: Weights are project policy, not source truth.
risk: High-confidence but narrow rows can overdominate coverage.
recommended_action: Add explicit eval_use and weight fields to score-map.

source_score_shape: Source scores should receive Kolm artifact outcome metadata after compile.
kolm_mapping: Map write-back to artifact ID, K-score, receipt ID, avoided-call proof, and fallback count.
normalization_rule: Write-back should not overwrite source scores.
risk: Kolm results disappear from source workflows.
recommended_action: Add write-back as separate metadata, not score mutation.

source_score_shape: No score-normalization fixtures or loss-report tests exist today.
kolm_mapping: Add fixtures for numeric, boolean, categorical, text, aggregate, missing direction, and conflict cases.
normalization_rule: Tests enforce no direct score-to-K-score path.
risk: Importer score claims will be unverifiable.
recommended_action: Add normalization fixtures before live importer APIs.
